articles.headline: World Cup matches kick off at the Bay Area stadium in Santa Clara
articles.summary: The 2026 FIFA World Cup is underway, with the Bay Area hosting six matches and free fan zones at Chase Center and PIER 39 drawing global crowds.

articles.headline: June primary decides the race to succeed Nancy Pelosi
articles.summary: Bay Area voters advanced two candidates in the 11th Congressional District primary to succeed the former House Speaker; turnout and cost-of-living dominated the campaign.

articles.headline: SF Board of Supervisors races sharpen fights over housing and public safety
articles.summary: The 2026 Board of Supervisors election is centering on housing affordability, homelessness, and downtown recovery.

articles.headline: Trump marks 80th birthday touting an agreement to end the war in Iran
articles.summary: The president hailed an initial deal to wind down the Iran conflict that had rattled the global economy.
